div.head: The Ambassador in Uruguay (Dawson) to the Secretary of State
div.p:
222. Average Uruguayan consumption wheat about 250,000 tons. Deptel 148, April 8 actual and estimated crop shortages total roughly 100,000 tons. Foreign MinisterEduardo Rodriguez Larreta. states while this amount required for normal needs, Govt is about to ration wheat probably on basis of
reduction of one-third in wheat deliveries to mills. Foreign Minister expresses personal belief that country can get by with imports of 50,000 tons. Inquires urgently whether US can assure supply of 50,000 tons for July delivery. Embtel 220April 10, not printed. today Foreign Minister points out that such assurances would greatly strengthen Uruguayan position vis-à-vis Argentina.
